visual-anti-patterns.notes: No purple-to-blue gradient backgrounds, no floating orbs, no nested cards, no cluttered dashboards; gallery card thumbnails have a subtle pastel gradient but are small contained areas, not large-area backgrounds

visual-child-friendly.notes: Large tappable object buttons with emoji icons, minimal text density, playful themed worlds and friendly AI buddy; builder right panel uses slightly adult-style labeling

visual-consistency.notes: Consistent purple accent, rounded corners, sans-serif type ramp, and card styling across all pages; gallery card gradient thumbnails introduce a mildly different visual treatment vs flat landing cards

visual-accessibility.notes: Strong text-on-white contrast throughout; nearly all interactive elements have text labels; however no visible focus rings in any screenshot and FAB/send buttons are icon-only without labels
